name: notion
description: Search, read, and create pages in Notion workspaces

envVars.name: NOTION_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Notion OAuth Client ID (from your integration)

tools.name: Search Notion
tools.description: Search pages and databases in the workspace

tools.name: Read Page
tools.description: Read the content of a Notion page

tools.name: Create Page
tools.description: Create a new page in a database or as a subpage

tools.name: Query Database
tools.description: Query a Notion database with filters and sorts

prompts.title: Search my docs
prompts.prompt: Search my Notion workspace for relevant documentation or notes about a topic.

prompts.title: Summarize a page
prompts.prompt: Read and summarize a specific Notion page. Extract the key points and action items.

prompts.title: Create meeting notes
prompts.prompt: Create a new meeting notes page with today's date, attendees, agenda, and action items sections.
